name: Fomateo
Fomateo
DETALLE MOLIENDA
query:
SELECT TOP 10000 CONVERT(DATE, fechaindustrial, 103) as fechaindustrial,[numero_pesada],v_pr_grupos.GRUPO,[razon_social] AS caniero,[numeroanalisis] as nro_muestra,[peso_neto] as cania_bruta,[trash],[trashReal],[Polporciento],
[Brixporciento],[Pureza],[Rendimiento],[RendimientoReal],v_pr_tipocana.NOMBRE AS tipo_cania,CONVERT(DATE, fecha_pesada, 103) as [fecha_pesada],[hora_pesada],
CONVERT(DATE, fecha_salida, 103) as [fecha_salida],[hora_salida],'' AS nromuestra2,[prepesada],[usuario],v_pr_tipocontrato.NOMBRE AS tipo_contrato,
[transporte],[chofer] as fletero,'' as cosechero, '' as finca,'' as nombre_finca,[patente],[observaciones],[tara]
FROM [CORONA].[dbo].[pr_ezi_muestralab2]
LEFT JOIN v_pr_tipocontrato on v_pr_tipocontrato.ID = tipocontrato
LEFT JOIN v_pr_tipocana on v_pr_tipocana.ID = id_tipo_cana
LEFT JOIN v_pr_grupos on v_pr_grupos.idcaniero = pr_ezi_muestralab2.id_caniero
WHERE YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, fecha_pesada, 103)) = YEAR(CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE())) -- and fechaindustrial IS NULL
order by CONVERT(DATE, fecha_pesada, 103) desc,hora_pesada desc;

name: Preparar INSERT para MySQL
CONSUMO POR HORA
query:
SELECT 
    COALESCE(k.fechaindustrial, g.fechaindustrial, h.fechaindustrial, e.fechaindustrial) as fechaindustrial,
    COALESCE(k.HORA, g.hora, h.hora, e.hora) as hora,
    COALESCE(g.kilos, 0) as gas,
    COALESCE(k.KILOS, 0) as kilos,
    COALESCE(h.humedad, 0) as humedad,
    COALESCE(e.bolsas, 0) as bolsas
FROM 
    (SELECT DISTINCT fechaindustrial as fechaindustrial, HORA
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral 
     WHERE codigoproceso='Molienda' 
    ) AS base
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial as fechaindustrial, HORA, COALESCE(KILOS, 0) AS KILOS
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral 
     WHERE codigoproceso='Molienda' 
    ) AS k ON base.fechaindustrial = k.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = k.HORA
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial as fechaindustrial, hora, COALESCE(kilos, 0) as kilos
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral 
     WHERE codigoproceso='Gas' 
    ) AS g ON base.fechaindustrial = g.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = g.hora
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial as fechaindustrial, hora, COALESCE(humedad, 0) as humedad
     FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral2 
     WHERE codigoproceso='Bagazo' 
    ) AS h ON base.fechaindustrial = h.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = h.hora
FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT fechaindustrial as fechaindustrial, 
            (LEFT([HORA], 2)+':00') AS hora, 
            SUM(COALESCE(CantBolsas, 0)) as bolsas
     FROM [CORONA].[dbo].[pr_ezi_especiales2]
     WHERE codigoproceso = 'Embolsado' 
     GROUP BY fechaindustrial, (LEFT([HORA], 2)+':00')
    ) AS e ON base.fechaindustrial = e.fechaindustrial AND base.HORA = e.hora
WHERE RIGHT(COALESCE(k.fechaindustrial, g.fechaindustrial, h.fechaindustrial, e.fechaindustrial),4) = YEAR(GETDATE())
ORDER BY fechaindustrial DESC, hora DESC;

name: Preparar INSERT para MySQL
PARADAS
Preparar INSERT para MySQL
DATOS_PROCESO_HORA
query:
SELECT TOP 3000  
	(SUBSTRING(b.fechaindustrial, 7, 4)+'-'+SUBSTRING(b.fechaindustrial, 4, 2)+'-'+SUBSTRING(b.fechaindustrial, 1, 2)) AS fechaindustrial,
    b.hora,
    MAX(CASE WHEN b.codigoproceso = 'Bagazo' THEN b.polautomatico END) AS pol_bagazo,
    MAX(CASE WHEN b.codigoproceso = 'Cachaza' THEN b.polautomatico END) AS pol_cachaza
FROM pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral2 b
WHERE b.codigoproceso IN ('Bagazo', 'Cachaza')
  AND b.fechaindustrial IS NOT NULL 
  AND b.hora IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY b.fechaindustrial, b.hora
ORDER BY 
    SUBSTRING(b.fechaindustrial, 7, 4) DESC,
    SUBSTRING(b.fechaindustrial, 4, 2) DESC,
    SUBSTRING(b.fechaindustrial, 1, 2) DESC, 
    b.hora DESC;

name: Preparar INSERT para MySQL
HISTORIAL(Cinta Larga-Corta)
query:
SELECT id, codigoproceso, (SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 7, 4)+'-'+SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 4, 2)+'-'+SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 1, 2)) AS fecharegistro, HORA,
Color, Turbidez, ROUND(Humedad*100,2) as Humedad, ROUND(Cenizas*100,2) as Cenizas, Granulometria_20,Granulometria_30, Sediment_Test AS sedimento, SO2
FROM pr_ezi_especiales
WHERE codigoproceso IN ('Cinta Corta', 'Cinta Larga', 'Embolsado') AND Color IS NOT NULL AND SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 7, 4) >= YEAR(GETDATE())-1
order by SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 7, 4) desc,SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 4, 2) desc,SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 1, 2) desc;

name: Preparar INSERT para MySQL
HISTORIAL (Embolsado-Crudo)
query:
select id, codigoproceso, (SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 7, 4)+'-'+SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 4, 2)+'-'+SUBSTRING(fecharegistro, 1, 2)) AS fecharegistro, HORA,
Color, Turbidez, ROUND(Humedad*100,2) as Humedad, ROUND(Cenizas*100,2) as Cenizas, Gran_20,Gran_30, Sedim_Test AS sedimento, SO2
FROM pr_ezi_especiales2
WHERE codigoproceso IN ('Embolsado','Crudo') AND Color IS NOT NULL AND SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 7, 4) >= YEAR(GETDATE())-1
order by SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 7, 4) desc,SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 4, 2) desc,SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 1, 2) desc;

name: HISTORIAL(PARAMETROS FABRICA)
query:
SELECT TOP 1000 (SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 7, 4)+'-'+SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 4, 2)+'-'+SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 1, 2)) AS fechaindustrial,hora,
				codigoproceso,brixautomatico AS brix,polautomatico AS pol, pureza, phmanual AS ph,kilos
from pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral
WHERE SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 7, 4) BETWEEN YEAR(GETDATE())-2 AND YEAR(GETDATE()) AND (brixautomatico IS NOT NULL OR polautomatico IS NOT NULL OR pureza IS NOT NULL OR phmanual IS NOT NULL OR KILOS IS NOT NULL)
order by SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 7, 4) desc,SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 4, 2) desc,SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 1, 2) desc, HORA desc,codigoproceso ASC;

name: INSERT PROMEDIOS Y TOTALES
HISTORIAL SULFITADO
query:
select (SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 7, 4)+'-'+SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 4, 2)+'-'+SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 1, 2)) AS fechaindustrial,hora,
				codigoproceso,phmanual AS ph, PPMS02manual
from pr_ezi_laboratorio_gral2
WHERE codigoproceso IN ('Encalado','Sulfitado') AND SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 7, 4) BETWEEN YEAR(GETDATE())-2 AND YEAR(GETDATE()) AND (phmanual IS NOT NULL OR PPMS02manual IS NOT NULL)
order by SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 7, 4) desc,SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 4, 2) desc,SUBSTRING(fechaindustrial, 1, 2) desc, HORA desc,codigoproceso ASC;

name: INSERT SULFITADO
